brief: Today's news covers UK bus fare caps, US strikes on Iran, Indian education protests, and Arizona primaries, while research explores AI for dementia care and visual programming tools.
news_summary: UK transport secretary defends bus fare funding; US renews Iran strikes as India's parliament protests education reform; Arizona primaries yield Trump-backed candidates.
papers_summary: Papers examine generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care, interactive visual query tools for logic programming, and rhetorical patterns in AI-assisted information evaluation.

en.brief: Today's news covers UK bus fare caps, US strikes on Iran, Indian education protests, and Arizona primaries, while research explores AI for dementia care and visual programming tools.
en.news_summary: UK transport secretary defends bus fare funding; US renews Iran strikes as India's parliament protests education reform; Arizona primaries yield Trump-backed candidates.
en.papers_summary: Papers examine generative AI for social connectedness in dementia care, interactive visual query tools for logic programming, and rhetorical patterns in AI-assisted information evaluation.

zh.brief: 日本职场性别争议与深圳地铁安检升级引发热议，同时特朗普法律纠纷持续；乌克兰军方人事变动，金门人对厦门机场建设态度矛盾；科研方面关注生成式AI在医疗伦理中的应用。
zh.news_summary: 日本‘Cool Biz’鼓励男性穿短裤，但女性遭‘腿毛骚扰’质疑；乌克兰军方人事变动；金门人对厦门机场建设态度矛盾；深圳地铁加强安检引民怨；特朗普诉BBC诽谤案法官令其交出记录。
zh.papers_summary: 无中文重点论文，英文研究聚焦AI辅助信息评估与人机交互可视化工具，如生成式AI在痴呆症护理中的伦理应用。

todays_image.caption: A voting machine's infamous hanging chads and a bus fare cap's assured funding both hinge on the question of whether the numbers truly add up.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Voting machine used in the 2000 Presidential election
